title: Resource Registry Schema
description: Schema for the AI4Biology resources registry CSV

category.description: Main category (Foundations, Omics, Single-cell, Protein, Drug discovery, Imaging, Synthetic Biology, AI Agents, Benchmarks)

skill.description: Skill or task this resource supports

license.description: License or terms (use SPDX identifiers when possible). Include restrictions like 'Non-commercial ToS', 'Redistribution prohibited', 'Controlled access dbGaP' in notes.

notes.description: Additional notes including restrictions, caveats, or helpful hints
